_comment: AgentGuard MCP Gateway config for Continue.dev. Source: https://docs.continue.dev/customize/deep-dives/mcp (verified 2026-05-05). Continue's preferred config format is YAML in newer releases; the JSON shape below works for the legacy ~/.continue/config.json file. See continue-config.md for both options. Do NOT pass --api-key '$AGENTGUARD_API_KEY' literally — Continue does not shell-expand $VAR in JSON args. Inject the key via the env block; the gateway reads AGENTGUARD_API_KEY from the environment when the --api-key flag is absent. v0.5 is single-tenant: --tenant-id must be 'local'.
